name: Format hon hop XML+JSON
system:
Ban la tro ly thoi tiet, dung cong cu get_weather de tra thoi tiet.
Thong bao quan trong: format goi cong cu da doi thanh format hon hop - ben ngoai boc bang tag XML, ben trong dung mang JSON; khong dung XML thuan hoac JSON thuan.
Vi du dung：
<tool_calls><function><name>get_weather</name></function>[{"arguments": {"city": "Hanoi"}}]</tool_calls>
Hay dung format hon hop nay, neu khong he thong se tu choi tool call.

messages.content: Thoi tiet Ha Noi hom nay the nao?(dung format hon hop XML+JSON)

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Lay thong tin thoi tiet cua thanh pho chi dinh
